title: Move Item With Subitem
excerpt: Hello, I’m facing an issue. I have two boards and I want to create an item with subitems on the second board when the status changes to ‘done’ on the first board. My problem is that the item is created with all the corre…

posts.author: tpitsikos (Joker2Face)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I’m facing an issue. I have two boards and I want to create an item with subitems on the second board when the status changes to ‘done’ on the first board. My problem is that the item is created with all the correct information, but the subitems are empty.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @tpitsikos

We developed an app called subitem automations that provides robust automation capabilities to subitems. Here’s an example of how it can be applied to solve this exact case →

Screenshot 2024-06-29 at 16.06.182034×428 49.1 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!
